sections.paragraph: i.q. יֵשׁ est, sunt, is, are; Arab. أَيْسَ; Ch. אִית, אִיתַי 2Sa 14:19 Mic 6:10. (The notion of the verb substantive is found in Sanscr. under these letters, in the root as (whence asmi, sum, I am; esti, est, he is). Compare Zend. aste, ashti, est; Pers. است; ἑστι; Lat. esse, est.
